resources.string: Atu톖팯c %1$.1f춿%2$s ac칦 l톖 piny t칢n th칬kdu 칢 %3$.1f춿%2$s
T톝팯m de w칢l 칢 y칬k.txt t칢n칢 server du
W칢l 칢 l칢k: Lu톖i de k칢 t톖팯 nhial al칢u b칦 battery du lac th칬k aw칛r th톝톝r
K칢 l칢u b칦 ya l톖c: URL 칢 th칢m 칢 th칢m
URL acie t톖팯u, wala ee k칢 c칦n k칢 t톖팯u th칦n. Y칦n al칢u ba l톖 n칢 th칢m yic ba URL 칢 th칛칛t 칢 th칛칛t mat th칦n
K칛 c칦 y칬k URL ac칦 b톝팯n
T칛칛u 칢 w칢l ku K칛 c칦 r칬t looi kedhi톝
K칛 c칦 r칬t wu톖팯톖팯c aac칦 r칬t looi ke them b칦k lu톖톖i de k칛콂 ya c톖팯kpiny
Ac칦 l칬ny b칦 %1$s w칢l mat ken칢 %2$s w칢l
Ke k칢 c칦 looi b칦 k칛 c칦 y칬k looi
Ac칦 th칬k b칦 w칢l ke p칦u 칢 pinynhom 칢b톝팯n looi apath t칢n칢 k칢duun ye k칛콂 t톖팯톖팯u, 칢ya d톝팯t w칢l ke %1$s
L톖 n칢 URL yic n칢 l칬칬콂ku yiic.txt
Th칬l 칢 j칛l 칢 p칦u 칢 p칦u 칢 p칦u
T톝팯n cen칢 kek r칬t lu톖톖i th칦n
T톝팯n 칢 y칬k \'%1$s\' ee k칢 cie th톖팯톖팯콂, t칦콂 칢 l칬칬콂ku ku them ba b톝톝r
URL c칦 y칬k ac칦칦 t톖팯u, ac칦 t톝팯톝팯u 칢 k칛콂 waar.txt b칦 rot waar
쿲톝n b칦 Fix I ku them ba b톝팯n bei
App k칢n칢 ac칦 t칛칛u-p칦ny ku th칛칛t 칢 th칛칛t 칢 th칛칛t 칢 th칛칛t 칢 Iigo Plugin 칢 weeWX. Fields al칢u b칦k c칦칦 r칬t ye nyu톖톖th apath agut c칦 weeWX c칦 keek waar
K칢 t톖팯u nhial ee k칢 c칦칦 lui, ye k칛콂 waar ku jal yaa dhukci칢칢n
%1$s 칢m톝n ak톖톖r %2$s 칢 w칢l 칢 l칢k t칢n칢 %3$s 칢 th칛칛t, y칦n aw칦c ba %4$s t칛칛u-p칦ny ku %5$s 칢 th칛칛t 칢 th칛칛t 칢 app k칢n칢 k칢c luui apath. C톖l Ok ku y칬k w칢l ju칢c n칢 %6$s
K칛 c칦 kek kueen n칢 p톝톝i de rou yic
K칛 ye kueen n칢 ru칬n w칛칛r c칦 l톖
K칢 c칦 looi n칢 k톖c cin, k칢 yen칢 k톖c c톖k l칛칛u nhom b칦 k칛콂 ya t칛칛u th칦n
Atu톖팯c %1$.1f춿%2$s ac칦 rot juak agut c칦 th칬kdu 칢 %3$.1f춿%2$s
K칛 k톖팯k ke p톝팯i ke p톝톝i?
Ac칦n k칢 b칦 y칬k wala app k칢c t톖팯톖팯u
K칛k 칢 l칢k aye w칦c b칦k y칦n l톝팯k naa c칦 atu톖팯c, de콂 w톝팯l톝팯/ka th칢m de de콂 th칬k 칢 th칬kdu th칬l
C칦 m톝n c칦 y칦n l칬칬콂 ke l칢k j칛i n칢 door yiic kaa rou, y칦n aw칦c ba pu톖팯l n칢 aju톝톝r yic n칢 th톝톝r k톖팯k, j톖팯k aju톝톝r?
T칦콂 칢 th칛칛 w칢n c칦 톢ok URL c칦 y칦n t칛칛u th칦n y칬k

plurals.name: processing_errors
plurals.item: An톖콂 %1$d 칢 k칛 c칦 r칬t wu톖팯톖팯c c칦 ke y칬k n칢 %2$s 칢 ath칬r yic, t칦콂 %2$s 칢 ath칬r c칦 y칬k n칢 %3$s wala t칦콂 %4$s 칢 l칬칬콂 c칦 keek y칬k n칢 w칢l 칢 l칢k yiic

resources.string: Ac칦 w칦c ba thura de radar y칬k
Radar thura a콂ot ke c칢 y칬k
T칛칛u 칢 \'%1$s\' ee k칢 ril, t칦콂 칢 ath칬r 칢 t톝팯톝팯u 칢 k칛콂 ku them ba b톝톝r
Rady칲r URL ak칢c t칛칛m. Y칦n al칢u ba l톖 n칢 th칛칛t yiic ba rot waar
Ye k톖c l톝팯k n칢 k칬칬lthok t칢 c칦n칢 de콂 톢et t칢 c칦n칢 ye t칛칛u th칦n
De콂 %1$.2f%2$s ac칦 th칬콂 keke th칬kdu 칢 %3$.2f%2$s
De콂 %1$.1f%2$s ac칦 th칬콂 kek th칬kdu 칢 %3$.1f%2$s
De콂 de %1$.2fin n칢 th칬k de %2$d %3$s ac칦 \'K칢 ril\' y칬k
De콂 de %1$.2fin n칢 %2$d c칦 l톖 %3$s ac칦 \'T톖팯톖팯u\' y칬k
De콂 de %1$.2fin n칢 th칬k de %2$d %3$s ac칦 \'T칦콂\' th칬k
De콂 de %1$.1fmm n칢 th칬k de %2$d %3$s ac칦 \'K칢 ril\' y칬k
De콂 de %1$.1fmm n칢 %2$d c칦 l톖 %3$s ac칦 \'T톖팯톖팯u\' y칬k
De콂 de %1$.1fmm n칢 th칬k de %2$d %3$s ac칦 \'T칦콂\' th칬k
K칛k 칢 l칢k 칢 de콂 d칦t ap톝i?
K칛 ye k톖c l톝팯k naa c칦 de콂 th칬k d칦t ap톝i t칢칢k ye rot g톝톝i n칢 th톝톝r ke de콂
W칢l 칢 l칢k 칢 p칦u 칢 p칦u?
K칛 ye k톖c l톝팯k naa c칦 de콂 th칬k de ji톝팯톝팯m t칢칢k n칢 th톝톝r ke de콂
K칛 ye k톖c l톝팯k naa c칦 de콂 th칬k de daai t칢칢k ye rot g톝톝i n칢 th톝톝r ke de콂
T칦콂 k칢 ye k톖c l톝팯k de콂
Ye 콂ic l톖n w칦c y칦n ba k칛콂 칢b톝팯n nyaai?
T칛칛u 칢 k칛콂 c칦 ri칛칛k n칢 app yic
Ku 콂oot ke y칬k w칢l c칦 kek y칬k
K칛 ye k톖c l톝팯k agut c칦 naa rou n칢 k칬칬l t칬kic t칢 c칦n칢 atu톖팯c 톢et t칢 c칦n칢 ye t칛칛u th칦n
K칛 ye keek lueel n칢 ye ak칛l k칛k yiic
K칛 kuc keek c칦 r칬t looi aac칦 r칬t looi
Ee k칢 c칦 rot waar n칢 wifi yic yet칬k?
T칛칛u 칢 w칢l yam, ku ka c칦n k칢 t톖팯 th칦n c칦 t톖팯톖팯u
Ku 칢 yic, ke y칦n 칢 kat
URL ac칦 t칛칛u n칢 k칢 c칦 t칛칛u th칦n yic wala ac칦 thi칛콂
Lu톖팯톖팯i 칢 th톝톝r 칢 yam 칢 yic
Ac칦칦 l칢u b칦 y칬k wala b칦 y칬k t칢n칢 URL 칢 th칛칛t c칦 lueel c칦 lueel
Ac칦칦 l칢u b칦 y칬k ka b칦 th칬칬콂 de k칛콂 y칬k
Ac칦 l칢u b칦 y칬k wala b칦 %1$s y칬k t칢n칢 %2$s
Ac칦n k칢 l칢u b칦 y칬k wala b칦 radada= thura t칛칛u n칢 aliiric
Ac칦칦 l칢u b칦 y칬k wala b칦 k칛 c칦ke t칛칛u th칦n y칬k t칢n칢 raandu
Ac칦칦 l칢u b칦 th칬콂 ka y칬k n칢 w톝bthait yic t칢n칢 raandu
Ac칦 l칢u b칦 %1$s nyaai rin URL ac칦n k칢 t톖팯u th칦n
Thura de w톝bthait a콂ot ke ye t칛칛u piny
URL de kompi칬ta acie t톖팯 ke c칢 t칛칛u piny ka c칢 th칬k
Al칢u b칦 na콂 k칢 c칦 waar ku th칬콂 de WiFi ac칦칦 l칢u b칦 ya y칬k
